code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut stopped = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if stopped
      i = n
    else
      let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
      match b_opt
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
          has = true
        else
          if has
            let next_sum = total + cur
            if next_sum > 100
              stopped = true
            else
              total = next_sum
            end
            cur = 0
            has = false
          end
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  if has and not stopped
    let next_sum = total + cur
    if next_sum <= 100
      total = next_sum
    end
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
